name: Azure Government (FedRAMP High)
description: Pre-built inheritance profile based on Microsoft Azure Government FedRAMP High authorization. Maps common infrastructure and platform controls to Azure Government's FedRAMP High boundary.

services.name: Microsoft Entra ID
services.description: Cloud-based identity and access management service providing authentication, authorization, and directory services for Azure Government.

Customer manages application-level user accounts and access provisioning.
Customer configures automated account management for application accounts.
Customer defines and enforces audit actions for account management events.
Customer implements application-level access enforcement.
Customer enforces separation of duties for application roles.

Customer configures application-level unsuccessful login attempt handling.

Customer configures application session termination policies.

Customer enforces MFA for non-privileged accounts.

Customer manages authenticators for application users.
Customer enforces password-based authentication complexity.
Customer identifies and authenticates non-organizational users.

services.name: Azure Networking
services.description: Network security services including NSGs, Azure Firewall, VPN Gateway, and DNS providing boundary protection and information flow enforcement.

controls.customerResponsibility: Customer configures NSGs, firewalls, and application-level information flow policies.

Customer establishes remote access policies for application management.
Customer authorizes and monitors privileged remote commands.
Customer controls access to mobile devices used for system access.

Customer configures application-level boundary protection.

services.name: Azure Monitor
services.description: Comprehensive monitoring and logging service including Log Analytics, providing audit record generation, storage, and analysis capabilities.

Customer configures alerts for audit processing failures.
Customer reviews and analyzes application audit records.
Customer integrates audit review with vulnerability scanning.
Customer retains audit records per retention requirements.
Customer enables application-level audit record generation.

services.name: Azure Key Vault
services.description: Hardware security module-backed service for managing cryptographic keys, certificates, and secrets used to protect data at rest and in transit.

controls.customerResponsibility: Customer manages application-level cryptographic keys.
Customer protects application data at rest.

services.name: Microsoft Defender for Cloud
services.description: Cloud-native security posture management and threat protection providing vulnerability assessment, security monitoring, and integrity verification.

Customer categorizes information and system.

services.description: Policy-driven governance service for enforcing organizational standards, assessing compliance, and managing configuration baselines across Azure resources.

services.description: Backup and disaster recovery services including Azure Backup and Site Recovery for ensuring business continuity and data protection.

services.description: Physical and environmental protection provided by Azure Government data center facilities including physical access controls, maintenance, and media protection.
